title: vamei Baby Doll Set, 12 Inches Baby Born Dolls for Girls, Baby Doll Accessories with Clothes Carrier Bassinet Bed Bottle Feeding Set, Pretend Play Toddler Toys Gift for 3 4 5 6 Years Old Girls
features: Complete Baby Doll Accessories Set: This set includes a portable baby doll bed that can also be used as a cradle, baby doll diapers, a baby doll bottle, a pacifier, and a dinnerware set with a plate, fork, and spoon. Specifically designed for 12 inches baby born dolls, it’s perfect for role-playing and imaginative play.

Versatile for Imaginative Play: The baby doll bed doubles as a cradle, allowing kids to gently rock their baby dolls to sleep. Children can feed their baby dolls, care for them, and change their diapers, making playtime realistic and engaging.

Promotes Skill Development: This baby doll set helps children develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and social skills. It also encourages creativity and empathy as kids imitate real-life situations during play.

High-Quality and Safe Materials: The baby doll bed and all accessories are made from soft, durable, and child-friendly materials. Smooth edges ensure safety, while the thoughtful design makes the set both long-lasting and visually appealing.

Perfect Gift for Kids: This baby doll accessories set is the ideal gift for girls and boys aged 3 and up. Whether for birthdays, Christmas, or other occasions, the set provides hours of fun and is a wonderful addition to any baby dolls for girls collection.
